title: elymus pectinatus
intro: Elymus pectinatus, also known as Slender Wheat-grass or Slender Wild Rye, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Elymus pectinatus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Elymus pectinatus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed for its medicinal benefits.
